metadata.title: Information Governance - Sharing Policy
metadata.description: Schema for machine-readable Data Sharing agreements and policies based on ODRL.

entities.name: SharingPolicy
entities.description: Defines the rules under which data can be used (Purpose, Roles, Controls).

fields.name: URI
fields.description: URI of the SharingPolicy (directly linking to a published machine readable copy).

fields.name: Identifier
fields.description: Unique ID object for the SharingPolicy.

children.name: value
children.description: The single unique identifier attached to the SharingPolicy.

children.name: System
children.description: System that the identifier adheres to.

fields.name: Party
fields.description: Information about a single party in the sharing policy. Parties can be both providers and recipients.

children.name: Name
children.description: The name of a party in the sharing policy.

children.name: CatalogueID
children.description: The ID of the party in the central API catalogue.

fields.name: Data
fields.description: A description of the specific data or data set (e.g., a database, file) that the rules apply to.

fields.name: Purpose
fields.description: Used to dictate what kinds of request are valid under the policy (e.g., Section 47).

fields.name: StartDate
fields.description: Used to limit Permission rules to a specific time frame.

fields.name: EndDate
fields.description: Used to limit Permission rules to a specific time frame.

fields.name: PermittedUse
fields.description: Grants the right to perform an Action on the Asset, such as odrl:read, odrl:reproduce.

fields.name: Restrictions
fields.description: Explicitly forbids an Action. For example blocking dissemination by prohibiting odrl:transfer.

fields.name: DataRecipientResponsibilities
fields.description: Actions the Recipient must perform (e.g., Duty to delete data).

fields.name: SecurityMeasure
fields.description: Permissions conditioned on specific security measures (e.g., encryption).
